case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. BRUCE MAESTAS et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION MARK D. WALSH FILED RE: INTEREST, CCP 1033(B)(2)NOTICE AND REQUEST FOR USE OF COPIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
NOTICE OF HEARING AND ACCOMPANYING PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION ANDREW RUNDQUIST FILED RE: FIRST SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION (CCP 585(D) CASE SUMMARY AND ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED ON THE GROUND THAT BRUCE MAESTAS HAS NOT SHOWN THAT ALL OF HIS EARNINGS ARE EXEMPT. (CCP 703.580.) FURTHER, THE COURT ORDERS $50.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM DEBTOR'S EARNINGS PER PAY PERIOD UNTIL THE DEBT IS SATISFIED. THE COURT WILL PREPARE AND SERVE AN ORDER. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN CSR #6185 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Appearances: Peter Henry Liederman (510.681.6916) appearing for plaintiff and moving party; Chelsea Whelan of the Law Office of Michael Heath (415.931.4207) appearing for defendant/debtor.

Argued and the Court rules as follows: Denied on the ground that Bruce Maestas has not shown that all of his earnings are exempt. (CCP 703.580.) Further, the Court orders $50.00 to be withheld from Debtor's earnings per pay period until the debt is satisfied. The Court will prepare and serve an order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)
